empty: No snapshots yet — one is created automatically before session edits or migrations

field.reasonDefault: Auto-created restore point; can be restored to this point at any time.

reasonText.beforeEdit: Auto-created before applying a session edit; can be restored to the pre-edit state.
reasonText.beforeRestoreGuard: Protective snapshot auto-created before restoring to another snapshot, used to undo that restore.
reasonText.beforeMigrate: Protective snapshot auto-created before migrating to a target tool, used for rollback on failure.

summary.title: Change summary
summary.fullState: Full session state: messages, tool calls, and file references

diff.title: Diff preview
diff.currentMinus: − Current session (changes after the snapshot will be overwritten)

epilogue: Restore first auto-creates a protective snapshot of the current state, then reverts to this snapshot. If verification fails after restore, Ferry keeps the current state and marks it in history; incomplete artifacts are not written.

toast.okDesc: Pre-restore state has been saved as a protective snapshot.
